---
title: Mapping Hiding Area for Jet Lag the Game Hide and Seek
author: Connor Mahone
---

```{r}
# Load packages required for the analysis
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(osmdata)
# library(leaflet or mapGL)
```

```{r}
# Optionally source functions from `functions.R` script
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
# Add more calls to source as needed
```
